description_long: This is a cylindrical barrel or bucket with a light blue, wood-textured exterior and a dark base. The surface displays subtle horizontal wood grain lines and small, evenly spaced knots, giving it a rustic appearance. On one side, there is a large, rectangular beige label with a black cap-like feature above it, possibly representing a spout or closure. The top is flat and matches the blue wood texture, while the sides are smooth and continuous. There are no visible handles or reinforcement bands, and the object appears hollow, suitable for holding liquids or materials. The overall design suggests it is intended for practical use in urban or semi-industrial settings.
description: A blue, wood-textured cylindrical barrel or bucket with a beige label and black cap feature on one side. It has a rustic, smooth exterior and no visible handles or bands.
description_view_0: Front view showing the beige label and black cap feature on the blue wood-textured surface.
description_view_1: Side view with uninterrupted blue wood texture and visible wood knots, no label or cap.
description_view_2: Rear view with continuous blue wood texture and minimal visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with blue wood texture and wood knots, label just out of sight.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: beige label with black cap feature
